headline: Does LKQ (LKQ) Still Have a Cost-Efficiency Edge After Earnings Miss and Boardroom Change?
summary: LKQ Corporation disclosed that director Patrick Berard has declined to stand for re-election and will remain on the board only until the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, following a recent quarter where revenue slightly exceeded expectations but earnings per share and full-year guidance fell short of analyst estimates. This combination of boardroom change and an earnings miss with cautious guidance raises questions about how management will balance operational discipline,...
